form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning by 1.3 len Chantilly LR October 11 over 1400m slow track defeating Commander's Intent carrying 58kg at $4.70. On debut third of 7 at this track August 9 over 1400m, 2 len behind Cielo Di Roma with 56kg at $11. Hard to fault and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by 2.5 len Chantilly G2 Criterium De Maisons Laffitte October 11 over 1200m slow track defeating Street Show with 58kg at $1.20. On debut fourth of 8 at Compiegne July 21 over 1400m, soft track; 6 len behind Trinquette with 56kg at $3.60. Suited here and have to follow up.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 44 days. Resuming favourite; scored a big 5.5 len win at Cagnes-sur-Mer January 12 over 1500m on a soft track defeating Walwood carrying 57kg at $3.10. Second run from a spell 2nd of 8 at Cagnes-sur-Mer in LR on February 22 over 1500m, on a slow track; head behind Baklawa carrying 56.5kg at $1.50. Others seem to have his measure.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Looking to keep his unbeaten record intact. When well in the market on debut, favourite; won by 2.75 len at Wolverhampton February 23 over 1408m defeating Waterford Castle carrying 56.5kg at $2.50. Last time out favourite; scored a big 6 len win at Wolverhampton March 9 over 1408m defeating Powder Monkey with 60.5kg at $1.30. Terrific chance to continue the strong form.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 10th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather in LR on March 8 over 1300m, 11 len behind My Calyx Cen with 57kg at $12. Previously second-up won by 3 len at Deauville All Weather December 18 over 1300m defeating Matinal carrying 58kg at $1.80. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when favourite; scored a big 4.5 len win at Chantilly All Weather November 10 over 1900m defeating Just The Two Of Us carrying 58kg at $2.60. Worth including.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(16). Resumes from a spell after only one run when favourite; scored a big 4.5 len win at Chantilly All Weather November 10 over 1900m defeating Just The Two Of Us carrying 58kg at $2.60. Worth including.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 14 at Riyadh Dirt in the SAUG3 SAUG3 SAUDI DERBY on February 14 over 1600m, 51 len behind Al Haram carrying 57kg at $26. Last start 3rd of 7 at Saint-Cloud in LR on March 15 over 1600m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Elastic carrying 58kg at $9.10. Sure to be thereabouts again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at La Zarzuela October 26 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Arzua with 57kg. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 9 len win. La Zarzuela September 28 over 1500m defeating Napoles with 57kg. Facing a stiff assignment.

La Zarzuela September 28 over 1500m defeating Napoles with 57kg. Facing a stiff assignment.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when won by 5 len at this track October 22 over 1600m on a heavy track defeating Rumoriste with 58kg at $7.90. In form and worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(17). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when won by 5 len at this track October 22 over 1600m on a heavy track defeating Rumoriste with 58kg at $7.90. In form and worth following up.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months from last on the turn 8th of 13 at Chantilly in LR on March 16 over 1100m, in the wet; 3 len behind Kimi Rey with 57kg at $35. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Craon on September 6 over 1650m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind Le Landin carrying 55.5kg at $24. Hard to have.
